'''清瀧'''（'''滝'''）'''神社'''（きよたきじんじゃ、せいりゅうじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]全国に存在する[[神社]]。

{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:きよたきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Kiyotaki Shrine''' (清瀧神社 / 清滝神社) refers to Shinto shrines located across Japan.
* {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Nikkō City)|ja|清瀧神社 (日光市)}} - Located in {{ill|Nikkō City|ja|日光市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Urayasu City)|ja|清瀧神社 (浦安市)}} - Located in {{ill|Urayasu City|ja|浦安市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Kanazawa City)|ja|清瀧神社 (金沢市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kanazawa City|ja|金沢市}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|ja|石川県}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City)|ja|清瀧神社 (大野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ōno City|ja|大野市}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|ja|福井県}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Tomoe)|ja|清滝神社 (大野市友江)}} - Located in Tomoe, Ōno City, Fukui Prefecture. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Nakasaba)|ja|清滝神社 (大野市中狭)}} - Located in Nakasaba, Ōno City, Fukui Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}

revision.text:
'''清瀧'''（'''滝'''）'''神社'''（きよたきじんじゃ、せいりゅうじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]全国に存在する[[神社]]。
* [[清瀧神社 (日光市)]] - [[栃木県]][[日光市]]鎮座 * [[清瀧神社 (浦安市)]] - [[千葉県]][[浦安市]]鎮座 * [[清瀧神社 (金沢市)]] - [[石川県]][[金沢市]]鎮座 * [[清瀧神社 (大野市)]] - [[福井県]][[大野市]]鎮座 * [[清滝神社 (大野市友江)]] - 福井県大野市友江鎮座 * [[清滝神社 (大野市中狭)]] - 福井県大野市中狭鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:きよたきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

* {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Nikkō City)|ja|清瀧神社 (日光市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotaki Shrine (Nikkō City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579714|1=Kiyotaki Shrine (Nikkō City)}} - Located in {{ill|Nikkō|en|Nikkō|qid=Q235753|lt=Nikkō City|1=Nikkō}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Seiryū Shrine (Urayasu)|ja|清瀧神社 (浦安市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryū Shrine (Urayasu)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Urayasu|en|Urayasu|qid=Q319729|lt=Urayasu City|1=Urayasu}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Kanazawa City)|ja|清瀧神社 (金沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotaki Shrine (Kanazawa City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579715|1=Kiyotaki Shrine (Kanazawa City)}} - Located in {{ill|Kanazawa|en|Kanazawa|qid=Q191130|lt=Kanazawa City|1=Kanazawa}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City)|ja|清瀧神社 (大野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579716|1=Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City)}} - Located in {{ill|Ōno, Fukui|en|Ōno, Fukui|qid=Q385684|lt=Ōno City|1=Ōno, Fukui}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|en|Fukui Prefecture|qid=Q133879|lt=Fukui Prefecture|1=Fukui Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Tomoe)|ja|清滝神社 (大野市友江)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Tomoe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579717|1=Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Tomoe)}} - Located in Tomoe, Ōno City, Fukui Prefecture. * {{ill|Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Nakasaba)|ja|清滝神社 (大野市中狭)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Nakasaba)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579718|1=Kiyotaki Shrine (Ōno City Nakasaba)}} - Located in Nakasaba, Ōno City, Fukui Prefecture.
